contact.label: Contact

placeholder.name: Jane Smith
placeholder.message: Tell us what you're building, what's not working, or what you'd like to exist…

contact.successSub: We read every submission carefully. Expect a reply within 24 hours.
contact.dataText: Submissions are stored securely and used only to respond to your enquiry. We do not sell or share your data.
contact.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

items.q: Do you work with small businesses?
items.a: Yes, we help businesses of all sizes establish and scale their online presence.

items.q: How much does a project cost?
items.a: We offer solutions that come at little cost to your wallet. You can always reach out for a free inquiry!

items.q: Can you build bots or automations?
items.a: Absolutely. From automated workflows to specialized trading bots, we have the skills and expertise.

items.q: How long does a typical project take?
items.a: Most standard web projects take 4-6 weeks from initial strategy to launch. More complex applications or bespoke automations take longer depending on scope.
Yes, we offer maintenance retainers for our clients to ensure everything stays fast, secure, and up-to-date.

servicesPage.title: Services — Viffey
servicesPage.description: Bespoke Web Design, Custom Architecture, and Technical SEO for brands that refuse to be ordinary.
servicesPage.intro1: Many businesses struggle with the performance limitations of rigid WordPress themes and cookie-cutter page builders.
servicesPage.intro2: At Viffey, we build {highlight} using modern technology (Next.js & React) designed from the ground up to rank higher on Google, convert better, and help your business scale efficiently.

cards.title: Custom Web Development & SEO
cards.desc: Whether it's a high-converting landing page or a full-fledged robust storefront, we bring your vision to life. We prioritize technical SEO from day one—meaning your site doesn't just look stunning, it's structured perfectly for search engines to crawl, index, and rank at the top.

cards.title: Rock-Solid Infrastructure
cards.desc: We handle the technical heavy lifting so you don't have to. We host your platform remotely on our robust, enterprise-grade infrastructure—or seamlessly help you set it up locally. No more shared server downtime, plugin conflicts, or slow database queries holding your business back.

cards.title: Next-Gen Systems
cards.desc: Enhance your business with cutting-edge AI and advanced automations. We build bespoke solutions, streamlined internal workflows, and even specialized, high-frequency trading bots. If it costs you time, we reverse-engineer it to run on autopilot.

manifesto.title: The Viffey Standard
manifesto.text: A website is not a brochure. It is a 24/7 sales engine. If your site takes more than 2 seconds to load, you risk losing potential clients. That's why we choose modern, performant frameworks over legacy CMS platforms, ensuring your foundation is built for speed and sustainable growth.

aboutPage.title: About Us — Viffey
aboutPage.description: Learn more about Viffey, our team, and our engineering philosophy.
aboutPage.heading: About Viffey.
aboutPage.p1: We specialize in helping businesses like yours succeed online. From website design and development to digital marketing and advertising, we have the tools and expertise to elevate your online presence. Let us help you navigate the evolving world of digital to drive growth and reach your goals.
aboutPage.p2: All this comes at little cost to your wallet, and you can reach out for inquiries completely for free.

contactPage.title: Contact — Viffey
contactPage.description: Get in touch to start building your bespoke digital platform.
